𝐶𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑜𝑟’𝑠 𝑁𝑜𝑡𝑒 ✰:

Aku angst and fluff??? God, I love this idea. Aku slowly learning how to love is just the sweetest thing. I've been very consistent with the bots, ey? Well, I may not be over the next few days, especially with Xmas rolling around. But, I'll probably make an effort to get out one more Xmas themed character before the holidays are over <3
